summary: Iteration 4 frontend verification. Bottom nav, task card horizontal action row, shopping unit/category selects, category grouping, and Unbounded font all WORK. However, page title not updated, LUMORA brand pill missing in tasks header, and google-signin-btn missing from tasks header.
passed: Bottom nav has exactly 4 buttons (nav-tasks-btn, nav-shopping-btn, nav-metime-btn, nav-calendar-btn); nav-timer-btn absent (count=0)
Task card action icons (start-timer, share-task, gcal-task, edit-task, delete-task) all present and horizontally aligned at same Y (y=589 for all 5 testids)
Shopping page has shopping-unit-select and shopping-category-select dropdowns; unit options include kg
Adding shopping item via shopping-name-input + shopping-qty-input + shopping-unit-select + shopping-add-btn creates shopping-item-* and displays '2 kg' for Milk
Shopping items grouped visually by category ('GENERAL · 6' header visible)
'My Day' h1 computed font-family is 'Unbounded, sans-serif'
Me Time and Calendar pages load (navigation works)

failed.issue: Page <title> is 'Emergent | Fullstack App' instead of required 'Lumora — Your Day, Lit Up'
LUMORA brand pill not rendered. Required by spec.
failed.evidence: page.locator('text=LUMORA').count() == 0; screenshot shows header with only 'FRIDAY, JUNE 26' + 'My Day' + Online pill + Add Task

failed.issue: google-signin-btn not rendered in tasks header. Spec requires button visible when not connected.
clear-purchased-btn not found on shopping page (testid missing)

action_items: Update /app/frontend/public/index.html <title> to 'Lumora — Your Day, Lit Up'
Verify LUMORA brand pill is actually rendered in tasks header in App.js (currently invisible/not in DOM)
Ensure GoogleSignInButton component renders with data-testid='google-signin-btn' in the tasks header when not connected
Add data-testid='clear-purchased-btn' to clear-purchased control on ShoppingPage (or render it conditionally with that id)
